zh.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow是Unknown的女兒，於1350年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可。她和Robert Lauder of The Bass I至少有15個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1419年在英國蘇格蘭享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow是Unknown的女儿，于1350年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可。她和Robert Lauder of The Bass I至少有15个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1419年在英国苏格兰享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Annabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell

en.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow was born in 1350, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland as the daughter of Unknown. She had at least 15 sons and 1 daughter with Robert Lauder of The Bass I. She died in 1419, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow est née en 1350, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, fille de Unknown. Elle a eu au moins 15 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Lauder of The Bass I. Elle est décédée en 1419, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow wurde 1350 in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Unknown geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert Lauder of The Bass I mindestens 15 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1419 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow è nata il nel 1350 nel North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland come figlia di Unknown. Lei avuto almeno 15 figli e 1 figlia con Robert Lauder of The Bass I. Morì nel 1419, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.East Lothian, Scotland: イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアン
ja.Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランド
ja.North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアノース バーウィック
ja.Midlothian, Scotland: スコットランドミドロスアン

ja.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallowは1350年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアノース バーウィックでUnknownの娘として生まれた。彼女はRobert Lauder of The Bass Iとの間に少なくとも15人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1419年にイギリススコットランドで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow(은)는 1350년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Lauder of The Bass I(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.East Lothian, Scotland: Lodainn an Ear, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow nasceu em 1350, em North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland filha de Unknown. Ela teve pelo menos 15 filhos e 1 filha com Robert Lauder of The Bass I. Ela faleceu em 1419, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow родилась в 1350 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Unknown. У неё было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 1 дочь от Robert Lauder of The Bass I. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Annabel Fallow nació en 1350, en North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland como hija de Unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 15 hijos y 1 hija con Robert Lauder of The Bass I. Murió en 1419, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
